articles.title: Man accused of shooting father in face with crossbow captured after snowy manhunt
articles.summary: A West Virginia man was arrested after allegedly shooting his father in the face with a crossbow and leading police on a snowy multi-county manhunt.

articles.title: Media under fire: Journalists keep questioning Iran war as Hegseth calls them ‘unpatriotic’ and ‘anti-Trump’
articles.summary: War Secretary Pete Hegseth slams media coverage of Iran conflict as "dishonest" while President Donald Trump reportedly rebukes Israeli allies over gas field bombing.

articles.title: Feds charge 3 in $2.5b scheme to smuggle us AI tech to China using dummy servers

articles.title: Missing University of Alabama student Jimmy Gracey found dead in Barcelona
articles.summary: The body of University of Alabama student Jimmy Gracey, 20, was recovered at Port Olimpic in Barcelona after a days-long search, his family confirmed.

articles.title: Ukraine peace talks on ‘situational pause’ as Middle East conflict intensifies: Kremlin
articles.summary: The Kremlin says Ukraine peace talks are on a 'situational pause' as Zelenskyy signals a Ukrainian team could resume negotiations as soon as Saturday.

articles.summary: DHS says Border Patrol recorded 10 straight months of zero migrant releases, crediting enforcement-first policies and historically low illegal crossings.

articles.title: UC Berkeley to pay $1M, overhaul policies after antisemitism lawsuit settlement
articles.summary: UC Berkeley will pay $1 million and adopt new antisemitism policies after settling a Brandeis Center lawsuit alleging harassment against Jews.

articles.title: Viral video appears to show blind plane passenger caught in tense service dog dispute

articles.title: California building with dozens of health care, hospice providers raises eyebrows amid fraud speculation

articles.title: World Baseball Classic final attracted historic viewership with over 10M watching on FOX
articles.summary: Venezuela's historic WBC title win over Team USA drew over 10.7 million viewers, making it the most-watched World Baseball Classic telecast ever, up 128% from 2023.

articles.title: Browns' NFL rule proposal on future draft picks in trades draws scrutiny
articles.summary: The Browns argued extending the NFL draft pick trade window from three to five years would create a more active trade market. Owners will vote on the proposal this month.

articles.title: California to change Cesar Chavez Day to Farmworkers Day after sexual abuse scandal
articles.summary: California State Assembly Speaker Robert Rivas announced plans to rename Cesar Chavez Day Farmworkers Day after allegations against the labor activist.

articles.title: Denmark secretly prepared to blow up Greenland's runways to stop US aircraft: report
articles.summary: Denmark disguised a troop deployment to Greenland as a NATO exercise called Arctic Endurance, with soldiers carrying explosives, DR reported, citing 12 high-level sources.

articles.title: Nuclear fusion advances, but challenges remain for power grid

articles.title: ICE agents told by relatives they will 'answer in hell' as families fracture over politics
articles.summary: ICE agents faced family rejection when immigration enforcement divided households, and some relatives told them they would “answer in hell" for their actions.

articles.title: Olympians speak out against Iran's public execution of champion wrestler Saleh Mohammadi
articles.summary: The sports world mourned the reported execution of Iranian wrestling star Saleh Mohammadi, 19, who Iran International says was publicly hanged by Iran's regime.

articles.title: Feds investigate alarming near miss between Alaska Airlines jet, FedEx plane at busy Newark airport
articles.summary: Federal authorities will investigate a reported close call at Newark airport involving an Alaska Airlines and FedEx aircraft on crossing runways Tuesday night.

articles.title: Jack Hughes clarifies remarks on Olympic gold medal puck after Hall of Fame says it’s staying put
articles.summary: Jack Hughes clarified his comments about wanting the Olympic gold puck after sparking a back and forth with the Hockey Hall of Fame over it's ownership.

articles.title: Duke survives stunning halftime deficit to hold off No. 16 seed Siena in March Madness' first round
articles.summary: The Siena Saints nearly became the third team in March Madness history to beat a No. 1 seed as a No. 16 seed, but the Duke Blue Devils rallied in the second half to avoid the upset.

articles.title: Major city hikes hotel tax to nearly 20% as tourism bosses eye future events
articles.summary: Chicago has raised the tourist tax on downtown hotels to 19% to boost tourism marketing efforts. A new district will fund Choose Chicago campaigns and events.

articles.title: Juror says Kouri Richins sympathy flipped after trial exposed kids’ book author’s plot to kill husband: report
articles.summary: A juror revealed how the jury in Utah author Kouri Richins' murder trial jury went from sympathetic to a unanimous guilty verdict in her husband's fentanyl poisoning death.

articles.title: Fox News' Shannon Bream scores fourth consecutive No 1 New York Times bestseller with new faith book
articles.summary: Shannon Bream's new book "Nothing is Impossible with God" debuted at No. 1 on the New York Times bestseller list, making it her fourth hit with Fox News Books.

articles.title: Mamdani moves to sideline NYC police with new safety office under sweeping overhaul

articles.summary: Animal crossing bridge in California faces delays and cost overruns as Newsom blames Trump tariffs for $114 million project originally set at $92 million.

articles.summary: A road rage incident in a Philadelphia suburb led to U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement arresting a violent illegal immigrant with a long criminal history.

articles.summary: All four Democrats on a House committee opposed advancing a measure pertaining to authorizing land for the construction of the Women's History Museum.

articles.title: Pritzker's $5M push for ally sparks fury from Congressional Black Caucus: reports
